items.html: Let us return to the first matter. Although in truth Itra de Hesed [the crown of mercy] is male and Itra de Gvura [the crown of judgment] is female, that is when they expand — this one in the Guf [body] of ZA [Zeir Anpin], and that one in the Guf of the Nukva [female], as is known. But so long as they are still within ZA, they are called complete males. Indeed, when they expand in his Guf, as said above, at the time Adam sinned — and afterwards, at the time of the Zivug [coupling], when he places them in the Yesod of his Nukva in the discernment of a drop of MAD [Mayin Duchrin, male waters] — they are complete males. But if these Gevurot [judgments] followed their true way — piercing the Masach [screen] of the back of Zeir, coming out into the Nukva, expanding in her own Guf, and afterwards she raises them in the discernments of MAN [Mayin Nukvin, female waters] — then they are female Gevurot. Especially in light of what is known, that these two Itrin [crowns] are the discernments of the two arms, Hesed and Gevura of AA [Arich Anpin]; therefore, while they are within Zeir they are called males, and when they expand in the Guf of the Nukva they are called females.
